node.text: Calvin enjoys capturing photos, including a beautiful shot in a Japanese garden.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "like capture photos") on Observation 4 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Calvin is planning to visit Tokyo next month after the tour ends and wishes sometimes to go back to places similar to those in the shared photos.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "like capture photos") on Observation 6 (Score: 0.91)

node.text: Calvin took a stunning picture of the Tokyo skyline last night.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "like capture photos") on Observation 4 (Score: 0.97)

node.text: Calvin started touring with Frank Ocean, which started in August last year after they met at a festival.
Calvin is excited about the energy from the crowd during the tour and feels lucky to collaborate and perform with Frank Ocean.
Calvin is excited for an upcoming performance in Tokyo this month to showcase his music to a new crowd and expand his following.
Calvin has had some great collaborations recently and his album is almost finished.
Calvin had an incident last week where his place got flooded, but he managed to save his music gear and favorite microphone.
Calvin went to a networking event to meet more artists to build up his fan base.
Calvin and Frank Ocean have a great chemistry on stage, and Calvin feels fortunate about it.
